name: Italian Cooking Sauce Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the stewed tomatoes.
2. Combine all ingredients in a large kettle or Dutch oven.
3. Simmer over medium-low heat for 15 minutes.
4. Cool and transfer into six one-pint containers, leaving half-inch space at the top.
5. Seal and label the containers as Italian Cooking Sauce Mix.
6. Freeze and use within 6 months.
Makes about 6 pints of mix.
